response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via open-source GIS platforms, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his readiness for the core C++-centric routing tile system.
strengths: Proven experience building geospatial platforms (GISCollective, Open Green Map) with real-world usage.
Strong background in distributed systems, low-latency apps, and DevOps tooling across multiple languages.
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across stacks, including embedded and systems-level programming (C++, DLang).
concerns: No explicit commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tile pipelines.
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js, with minimal evidence of modern C++ systems development.
Lacks clear evidence of fault tolerance, consistency, or distributed systems work in geospatial data contexts.
